name: ginext
description: Native build dependencies for ginext on Windows (x64 and arm64) via vcpkg.
Default feature set covers the core GObject-Introspection runtime needed to
build and test ginext itself; gtk/gstreamer are opt-in for the wider suites.

gtk.description: GTK4 stack with introspection (for the ginext-gtk suite).

gstreamer.description: GStreamer stack with introspection (for the ginext-gst suite).
